name: knowledge-seo
description: Stack-independent SEO conventions as intent-triggered skills so a site is built with baseline SEO by default: meta-tags, structured-data, robots, sitemaps, url-structure, canonicalization-and-redirects, javascript-seo, page-experience, media-seo, international, social-preview, indexnow, generative-seo, seo-audit. Domain delivery plugins (knowledge-vue) depend on this.
